name: AWS Validator Rainbow Wallet Payout Destination
reviewChecklist: Confirm Rainbow wallet controls this address before any transfer.
Confirm chain/network selected in Rainbow matches source chain.
Send a small test transaction first.
Verify receipt on explorer before larger movement.
Record transaction hash in the ledger after manual signing.
Never paste seed phrase, private key, or wallet recovery material into GitHub, AWS, Postman, Airtable, Linear, or chat.
